---
title: Projects
description: A collection of research software and projects in climate science and R programming.
---

<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-md-3 g-4 mt-2">

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<a href="https://lemuscanovas.github.io/synoptreg/">
<img src="images/projects/synoptreg.png" class="card-img-top" alt="synoptReg" style="object-fit: contain; height: 180px; background: white; padding: 1rem;">
</a>
<div class="card-body">
<h5 class="card-title"><a href="https://lemuscanovas.github.io/synoptreg/" class="text-decoration-none">synoptReg</a></h5>
<p class="card-text small">R package for computing synoptic climate classifications and spatial regionalization of environmental variables using gridded atmospheric data.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<a href="https://ropenspain.github.io/climaemet/">
<img src="images/projects/climaemet.png" class="card-img-top" alt="climaemet" style="object-fit: contain; height: 180px; background: white; padding: 1rem;">
</a>
<div class="card-body">
<h5 class="card-title"><a href="https://ropenspain.github.io/climaemet/" class="text-decoration-none">climaemet</a></h5>
<p class="card-text small">R package (rOpenSpain) to download and visualize climate data from AEMET (Spanish Meteorological Agency) API.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<a href="https://www.ari.ad/en/research/">
<img src="images/projects/pyrenees.png" class="card-img-top" alt="Pyrenees Climate" style="object-fit: contain; height: 180px; background: white; padding: 1rem;">
</a>
<div class="card-body">
<h5 class="card-title"><a href="https://www.ari.ad/en/research/" class="text-decoration-none">Pyrenees Climate</a></h5>
<p class="card-text small">High-resolution climate projections for the Pyrenees combining dynamical downscaling with observational data to characterize future climate scenarios.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ac1c88">
<img src="images/projects/compound.png" class="card-img-top" alt="Compound Events" style="object-fit: contain; height: 180px; background: white; padding: 1rem;">
</a>
<div class="card-body">
<h5 class="card-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ac1c88" class="text-decoration-none">Compound Events</a></h5>
<p class="card-text small">Research on dry-hot compound events in the Pyrenees under current and future climate conditions, assessing changes in frequency, intensity, and duration.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
